title: Science Mesh Site Exit Procedure
author: Müller, Daniel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this document the Science Mesh Site Mesh Exit Procedure is described. It will describe the consequences of site decommissioning and the necessary steps that need to be undertaken and the entities that need to undertake the necessary steps.
steps_raw: In this document the Science Mesh Site Mesh Exit Procedure is described. It will describe the consequences of site decommissioning and the necessary steps that need to be undertaken and the entities that need to undertake the necessary steps.
